prompt: Create a highly detailed vintage-inspired illustrated travel poster and infographic for {argument name="country name" default="Switzerland"}, shown as a sculpted 3D relief map centered on a clean light gray background. At the top, place a huge bold black sans-serif title reading {argument name="headline text" default="SWITZERLAND"}, with smaller uppercase text below reading TRAVEL GUIDE, flanked by thin horizontal divider lines and a tiny red shield emblem with a white cross. The centerpiece is a raised topographic map of Switzerland rendered like a miniature diorama, with rocky borders, green valleys, snowy alpine peaks, blue lakes, winding white roads, and a few rail lines. Mark exactly 12 destinations on the map with black dot markers and bold black capsule labels with white uppercase text: BASEL, ZÜRICH, ST. GALLEN, LUCERNE, BERN, INTERLAKEN, CHUR, ST. MORITZ, LUGANO, ZERMATT, GENEVA, and LAUSANNE. Integrate miniature landmark buildings and scenery directly onto the map, including churches, old town towers, waterfront structures, castles, and mountain villages, plus two small red trains moving through the landscape. Add surrounding travel ephemera arranged around the map: 1 worn brown vintage suitcase with travel stickers and a red Swiss-cross badge in the upper left, 1 antique brass compass rose on the left, 1 postage stamp in the upper right reading TRAVEL TO SWITZERLAND with mountain art and postal cancellation marks, 1 realistic Swiss flag on a pole in the top right corner, 1 tilted polaroid photo in the lower left with snowy mountains and the caption {argument name="photo caption" default="Swiss Alps"}, and 4 faceted heart-shaped crystal charms total, with 2 clear/silver hearts and 2 red hearts placed around the composition. On the right side, add a vertical sightseeing list with icon illustrations and thin separators, containing exactly 12 city entries with headings and short attraction lines: ZÜRICH — Bahnhofstrasse; Old Town (Altstadt); Lake Zurich. LUCERNE — Chapel Bridge; Lion Monument; Lake Lucerne. INTERLAKEN — Jungfraujoch; Harder Kulm; Lake Brienz & Thun. ZERMATT — Matterhorn; Gornergrat Railway; Skiing & Hiking. GENEVA — Jet d'Eau; United Nations; Lake Geneva. LAUSANNE — Olympic Museum; Lausanne Cathedral; Lake Geneva. BERN — Federal Palace; Zytglogge Clock Tower; Bear Park. ST. MORITZ — St. Moritz Lake; Skiing; Luxury Shopping. LUGANO — Lake Lugano; Monte Brè; Swiss-Italian Culture. ST. GALLEN — Abbey Library; St. Gallen Cathedral; Textile Museum. CHUR — Old Town; Bishop's Palace; Rhine Valley. BASEL — Kunstmuseum; Basel Minster; Rhine River. Use a premium editorial travel-brand aesthetic, combining realistic miniature map rendering, crisp typography, soft studio shadows, subtle drop shadows under objects, and a polished tourism campaign look.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张细节丰富、复古风格的插画旅行海报及信息图，主题为 {argument name="country name" default="Switzerland"}，以浅灰色背景为中心，展示一座雕塑般的 3D 地形图。顶部放置醒目的黑色无衬线粗体标题 {argument name="headline text" default="SWITZERLAND"}，下方配以较小的全大写文字 TRAVEL GUIDE，两侧饰有细水平分隔线，并点缀一个带有白色十字的小型红色盾徽。核心部分是瑞士的立体地形图，呈现出微缩模型的效果，包含岩石边界、绿色山谷、积雪的阿尔卑斯山峰、蓝色湖泊、蜿蜒的白色公路以及几条铁路线。在地图上精确标记 12 个目的地，使用黑色圆点标记和白色大写文字的黑色胶囊标签：BASEL、ZÜRICH、ST. GALLEN、LUCERNE、BERN、INTERLAKEN、CHUR、ST. MORITZ、LUGANO、ZERMATT、GENEVA 和 LAUSANNE。将微缩地标建筑和景观直接融入地图，包括教堂、老城塔楼、滨水建筑、城堡和山村，并添加两列穿过景观的红色小火车。在地图周围添加旅行纪念品元素：左上角放置 1 个带有旅行贴纸和红色瑞士十字徽章的磨损棕色复古手提箱；左侧放置 1 个古董黄铜罗盘；右上角放置 1 枚印有 TRAVEL TO SWITZERLAND 字样、带有山脉艺术和邮戳的邮票；右上角放置 1 面立在旗杆上的写实瑞士国旗；左下角放置 1 张倾斜的宝丽来照片，展示雪山并配有标题 {argument name="photo caption" default="Swiss Alps"}；此外，在画面周围放置总共 4 个多面心形水晶吊坠，包括 2 个透明/银色心形和 2 个红色心形。在右侧添加一个带有图标插图和细分隔线的垂直观光列表，包含 12 个城市条目，每个条目包含标题和简短的景点介绍：ZÜRICH — 班霍夫大街；老城区 (Altstadt)；苏黎世湖。LUCERNE — 卡贝尔桥；狮子纪念碑；卢塞恩湖。INTERLAKEN — 少女峰；哈德昆观景台；布里恩茨湖与图恩湖。ZERMATT — 马特洪峰；戈尔内格拉特铁路；滑雪与徒步。GENEVA — 大喷泉；联合国总部；日内瓦湖。LAUSANNE — 奥林匹克博物馆；洛桑大教堂；日内瓦湖。BERN — 联邦宫；时钟塔 (Zytglogge)；熊苑。ST. MORITZ — 圣莫里茨湖；滑雪；奢侈品购物。LUGANO — 卢加诺湖；布雷山；瑞士-意大利文化。ST. GALLEN — 修道院图书馆；圣加仑大教堂；纺织博物馆。CHUR — 老城区；主教宫；莱茵河谷。BASEL — 巴塞尔艺术博物馆；巴塞尔大教堂；莱茵河。采用高端编辑旅行品牌美学，结合写实的微缩地图渲染、清晰的排版、柔和的摄影棚光影、物体下方的细腻投影，打造出精致的旅游宣传视觉效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: 瑞士旅游指南 3D 地形图海报：一张精致的旅游信息图海报，展示了瑞士的 3D 地形图，标注了 12 个目的地、地标建筑，并辅以复古旅行元素，适用于编辑或宣传用途。
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, 3d, vintage, luxury, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
